SEQUENCE.COMMENT: putWithFail - put a single FTP file with a framework FE0535 failure on error
modified 4/14/21 to allow transfermode as an optional parameter that defaults to binary

BRANCH.COMMENT: if the required input is not supplied, fail

INVOKE.NAME: sFwTracetransid==$null || sFwTracetransid==''
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE9999 - A trace or transaction id is required

Values.value: FE9999 - A trace or transaction id is required

INVOKE.NAME: localfile==$null || localfile=='' || remotefile==$null || remotefile==''
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE9999 - A localfile and remotefile are required

Values.value: FE9999 - A localfile and remotefile are required

MAP.NAME: transfermode==$null || transfermode==''
MAP.COMMENT: transfermode=binary - this should always be the case - the exception is here just for the AS400

INVOKE.COMMENT: remotefile - normally this is hardcoded to just binary

SEQUENCE.NAME: ctype != 'normal'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: transient error on put, so fail the delivery
